title: Email validation learning system
body: Diff-based learning: compare generated vs sent emails to extract calibration signals. Updates CRM, blocks knowledge promotion on critical errors, logs preferences. Creates feedback loop for continuous improvement.

title: Email Validation Feedback Loop
body: Build draft-vs-sent email comparison system. Diffs extract corrections (relationship depth, business terms, context). Human-in-the-loop approval gate before updating stable knowledge. Prevents pollution of CRM/Knowledge with incorrect AI interpretations. Spec: N5/docs/email-validation-feedback-loop.md

title: Define auto-injection rules per channel for Content Library
body: Specify rules for when/how to auto-inject snippets and links from Content Library into generated outputs. Per-channel rules (email, LinkedIn, docs). Includes audience matching, purpose tagging, and last_used telemetry.

title: Vibe Debugger Persona
body: Create a specialized debugging persona (similar to Vibe Builder) optimized for troubleshooting, error analysis, and systematic problem-solving. This persona would excel at: identifying root causes, analyzing failure modes, proposing diagnostic approaches, and methodically resolving technical issues across the N5 system and workflows.

title: Email Output Refinement Loop: Proposed vs. Sent Delta Analysis
body: Create a feedback loop that tracks emails generated/proposed by AI vs. emails actually sent (with edits). Analyze the delta between proposed and sent versions to build an always-on output refinement loop that learns from user edits and improves future generations.

title: Create Zo system product feature matrix (core vs add-ons)
notes: Improper ingestion - reprocessing via correct pipeline

title: Finalize Zo Bridge functionality (blocking Zo system deployment)
notes: Improper ingestion - reprocessing via correct pipeline

title: Establish account cloning refs/points for Zo system deployment
notes: Improper ingestion - reprocessing via correct pipeline

title: Build demonstrator account specification and feature set
notes: Improper ingestion - reprocessing via correct pipeline

title: Systems of remembering and forgetting
body: Design N5 processes that support strategic forgetting while capturing what needs external memory. Leverage V edge of not carrying things mentally to enable fresh thinking. From 2025-09-30 voice memo.

title: Enhanced speaker identification in meeting processing
body: Improve meeting extraction to identify speakers AND attribute organizational side (Careerspan vs external). Critical for CRM intelligence and hypothesis tracking. From 2025-09-30 voice memo.

title: Prediction & hypothesis tracking system
body: Build system to track personal predictions, business hypotheses, and market hypotheses. Track outcomes over time to improve forecasting accuracy and identify patterns. From 2025-09-30 voice memo.

title: Build out market hypothesis builder with stakeholder clustering
body: Create a system that clusters stakeholder POVs together to generate categories like 'what hiring thinks', 'what talent thinks', 'what community owners think', etc. This would be a stakeholder-by-stakeholder analysis that aggregates perspectives into meaningful segments.

title: Learning Depth Matrix - Understanding Level Classification
body: Design and implement a matrix/taxonomy for classifying the degree or level of learning/understanding achieved in conversations. Create a framework that can categorize learning moments by depth (surface/intermediate/deep), domain (technical/business/strategic), and retention value. This would complement the learning capture system by providing qualitative assessment of knowledge transfer and help prioritize which learnings warrant deeper documentation or knowledge base integration.

title: Learning Capture System - Conversation Knowledge Extraction
body: Create an equivalent system to lessons/commands that captures and processes discussions where learning occurred. Build infrastructure to identify, extract, and store learnings from conversations similar to how the lessons system tracks architectural learnings and the commands system tracks executable workflows. This would enable systematic capture of knowledge gained through discussions, technical explanations, and learning moments.

title: ParentZo ↔ ChildZo Production Messaging (Phase 2)
body:
## Context

Phase 2 implementation of production-grade messaging between ParentZo and ChildZo instances. Phase 1 (architectural blueprints) completed 2025-10-20. Phase 2 deferred per YAGNI until real pain emerges.

## What Phase 2 Provides

Production-grade reliability, monitoring, and recovery for inter-Zo communication:

1. **Reliability guarantees**: automatic retries, exactly-once semantics, no lost messages
2. **Deduplication**: prevents duplicate task execution (double-charges, duplicate effects)
3. **Observability**: dashboards, alerts, error tracking for failures
4. **Recovery tools**: dead letter queues, replay capability, forensics

## Implement When Experiencing

**Trigger symptoms (any one = revisit Phase 2):**

- **Messages lost**: Parent sends work but Child never receives, or Child responds but Parent never sees reply
- **Duplicate work**: same task processed multiple times causing real problems (billing errors, duplicate notifications, data corruption)
- **Invisible failures**: things break silently; team learns from user complaints instead of proactive alerts
- **Manual recovery**: failures require manual investigation and re-processing; no automated replay capability

## Current State

- Zo Bridge operational and adequate for current scale
- Phase 1 deliverables archived in Documents/System/ParentZo-ChildZo/
  - Production proposal with YAGNI-optimized decisions (SQS FIFO, Postgres idempotency, essential observability)
  - Action plan (4 phases, 5-6d estimate)
  - SQL migrations for idempotency table
  - SQS queue creation scripts
  - Handler template with retry/backoff/logging
  - E2E test matrix (8 scenarios)

## Implementation Effort

5-6 days (Phase 2-4 from action plan):
- Wire real AWS SQS + Postgres clients
- Deploy metrics + CloudWatch alerts
- Run E2E test suite in staging
- Rollout with canary deployment

## References

- Documents/System/ParentZo-ChildZo/production_proposal.md
- Documents/System/ParentZo-ChildZo/action_plan.md
- Documents/System/ParentZo-ChildZo/DELIVERABLES.md
- Parent conversation: con_5eArZZYx1rzSFEmv

title: Calendar Intelligence System - Self-Improving Event Enrichment & Smart Scheduling
description: Build comprehensive calendar management system that: (1) enriches events with context from emails/meetings/CRM, (2) learns patterns about people and meeting types, (3) schedules intelligently based on actual availability + learned preferences, (4) generates pre-meeting prep packages, (5) adapts over time based on feedback. Would transform calendar from reactive to proactive intelligence.
benefits: Deep integration with Akiflow task system
next_action: Review design proposal and schedule 3-session build (3h + 3h + 2h)
